rationale: The proposed change concerns the property-tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.001 governs student codes of conduct and is wholly unrelated to property tax or homestead exemptions.
quote: The board of trustees of an independent school district shall, with the advice of its district-level committee established under Subchapter F, Chapter 11, adopt a student code of conduct for the district.
_note: No overlap between proposed change and rule text.
